violationJustifications.commands-one-way:lib/migration.js->lib/c: doctor migration 2.61.0 reuses setup gitignore helper — one-way exception until helper moves to lib/
violationJustifications.dashboard-read-only:lib/dashboard-server: dashboard analytics tab reads collectAnalyticsData at route boundary only — no spec/engine file parsing in routes
server shell delegates action derivation to workflow-read-model — read-only projection, not engine mutation
violationJustifications.workflow-core-barrel:lib/agent-quota-pol: poller acquires engine lock for quota sidecar writes — sanctioned until lock facade exists

violationJustifications.workflow-core-barrel:lib/auto-session-st: session-state sidecar uses workflow lock for atomic append

violationJustifications.workflow-core-barrel:lib/dashboard-actio: dashboard agent-control appends engine events via action boundary

violationJustifications.workflow-core-barrel:lib/migration.js->l: state migrations replay engine events — must touch engine internals
